insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -2.5% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -0.7%, App Total Install +7.6%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -14.6% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-07 vs 06-30 = -14.6% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-30 vs 06-23 = +1.1% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — All App softening (-2.5% vs upstream +3.5%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: All App -2.5% vs upstream +3.5% (conversion softening); YMK -3.5% vs upstream +9.1% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Install up across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Install is up across every app (All App +7.6%, YMK +13.2%, YCP +12.6%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
